meaning: n.拖,拖曳所用之绳,麻的粗纤维vt.拖,曳,牵引vi.拖行,被拖带
examples: They threatened to tow away my car.
He had been using the vehicle to tow his work trailer..
The car broke down and we had to get somebody to give us a tow.
This rover can tow a variety of instrument packages to conduct glaciological and atmospheric sampling studies.
He bought a Privateer with twin 150hp engines and sank a tow post into the stern.
